notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Byron Buxton reaches on a fielding error by right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Alex Jackson to 3rd. Byron Buxton to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Josh Bell doubles (14) on a ground ball to right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Kody Clemens scores. Royce Lewis scores. Throwing error by right fielder Brandon Nimmo.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Josh Bell doubles (14) on a ground ball to right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Kody Clemens scores. Royce Lewis scores. Throwing error by right fielder Brandon Nimmo.

notableEvents.label: Byron Buxton reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Byron Buxton reaches on a fielding error by right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Alex Jackson to 3rd. Byron Buxton to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Josh Bell doubles (14) on a ground ball to right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Kody Clemens scores. Royce Lewis scores. Throwing error by right fielder Brandon Nimmo.

notableEvents.label: Kody Clemens GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kody Clemens grounds into a double play, second baseman Josh Smith to shortstop Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger. Byron Buxton out at 2nd. Kody Clemens out at 1st.
